hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.md|*.markdown) out=$(uvx --from git+https://github.com/jv-k/deslopper@038e6b5170b4d5d97eff143a17475181d73aea99 deslopper lint "$f" 2>&1) || { printf 'deslopper found machine-writing tells in %s. Fix them now: the error tier blocks CI.\n%s\n' "$f" "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; esac; }
